Data as of: May 18, 2026

Campaign Overview

May 1–18, 2026

📋 Performance Summary

Meta · Since May 4 TikTok · Since May 11 Walmart · Since May 12

The Dippin' Dots Spring/Summer 2026 paid media campaign is live across three platforms and off to a strong start. With Meta running since May 4 and TikTok and Walmart launching in mid-May, all placements are still in early optimization — and the results so far are encouraging across the board.

Meta is the standout performer this period. The Engagement campaign has delivered 5,250 post engagements at a $0.15 CPE with an impressive 15.5% engagement rate — a strong signal that the creative is landing with the audience. The Traffic/Retargeting campaign is also punching above its weight, generating 464 landing page views at just $0.21 per visit with a 3.19% CTR — well above the 0.56% Meta benchmark. Frequency sits at a healthy 1.16, indicating the retargeting pool is not yet experiencing fatigue.

TikTok launched May 11 and has already built meaningful awareness, reaching an estimated 173,000 unique users at a highly efficient $1.76 CPM. That's well below typical TikTok benchmarks of $3–4+, suggesting strong ad relevance and solid algorithm alignment out of the gate.

Walmart Connect launched May 12 and is tracking 417 attributed transactions and $2,720 in attributed sales against $2,550 in spend. The current 1.17× ROAS is below the 3–5× benchmark, but this is expected behavior in the first 1–2 weeks while Walmart's algorithm accumulates purchase signals. We anticipate meaningful improvement over the next 2–3 weeks as optimization kicks in.

Display campaigns are currently in setup and will be added to reporting once live.

Creative Performance

Social · Meta + TikTok
📊 Creative Analysis — May 1–18, 2026 The creatives below are ranked by their primary platform KPI: Engagement Rate & CPE for Meta, and Reach & CPM for TikTok. Top performers should be sustained and used as a template for new creative development. Assets flagged for refresh are underdelivering relative to campaign averages and should be prioritized for replacement.
